title: UX Research Toolkit — Core Schema
description: Core data model shared by all UX map types (experience maps, journey maps, etc.)

meta.description: Document metadata and map type identification

profile.description: Profile manifest name used to render this document

examples: A Day in the Life: María

created.description: ISO 8601 date the document was first created

updated.description: ISO 8601 date the document was last modified

persona.description: The primary user persona this map centers on

age.description: Age of the persona in years

role.description: Professional role or life role of the persona

location.description: City, country or region of the persona

avatar_emoji.description: Single emoji representing the persona visually

primary_pain.description: The central unresolved pain or worry driving the persona's behaviour

context.description: One-sentence situational context: who they are and what circumstance grounds this map

phases.description: Ordered list of phases or stages that make up the map timeline

analysis.description: Synthesized insights derived from the full map

pain_points.description: Concise list of the most significant user pain points identified across all phases

moments_of_truth.description: Critical inflection points where user perception of the experience shifts decisively

phase.description: The phase id where this moment occurs

description.description: What happens and why it is a decisive moment

recommended_next_map.description: Canonical map type identifier for the suggested follow-up research artifact, or null if none

phase.description: A single phase or stage in the map timeline

id.description: URL-safe unique identifier for this phase

label.description: Human-readable display name for the phase

icon.description: Single emoji used as a visual icon for this phase
